entries.title: LLM Output Version Lens
entries.notes: Captures and versions every LLM response with diff view for comparison. Built in under 2 weeks using local storage and a diff library. Fills gap left by ChatGPT/Claude not persisting version history. Targets internal devs who iterate heavily on AI prompts.
entries.pain: Developers lose track of AI output versions and waste time regenerating lost results

entries.title: International Shipping Cost Overlay
entries.notes: Detects e-commerce checkout pages and overlays estimated shipping for common international routes. Buildable with shipping API integrations in 3 weeks. No major competitor does this at checkout-time. Freemium model with route limit, premium for unlimited.
entries.pain: Online shoppers waste time visiting multiple sites to compare international shipping costs

entries.title: Meeting Hours Accumulator
entries.notes: Reads Google Calendar API and displays running daily/weekly meeting hours in browser toolbar. Simple build under 1 week using Google Calendar API. Addresses unmet need for calendar-level meeting load awareness. Tip jar monetization for premium insights.
entries.pain: Professionals lose track of total meeting time and suffer from chronic over-scheduling

entries.title: Job Posting Benefits Comparator
entries.notes: Scrapes job postings and extracts/structures health insurance, PTO, 401k match, and remote policy. Uses NLP to normalize benefits into comparable scores. Built in 3-4 weeks with scraping and basic ML. No direct competitor offers browser-side comparison.
entries.pain: Job seekers spend hours manually comparing benefits packages across different job postings

entries.title: GitHub Issue Triager Bot
entries.notes: Uses LLM to read new issues, ask clarifying questions, tag with labels, and route to appropriate contributors. Integrates via GitHub Actions webhooks. Built in 4 weeks with LangChain and GitHub API. Per-seat pricing for maintainers managing large repos.
entries.pain: Open source maintainers spend hours triaging issues instead of coding

entries.title: npm Package Health Radar
entries.notes: Overlays npm package health metrics: last publish date, open issues ratio, maintainer activity, and security advisories directly on npmjs.com. Built in 2 weeks using npm registry APIs. Fills gap between manual npm visits and full dependency scanning tools.
entries.pain: Dev teams miss critical signals that npm packages are abandoned or vulnerable

entries.title: Slack Message Tone Rewriter
entries.notes: Intercepts Slack message compose box and offers tone-shifted alternatives using LLM before sending. Built in 2 weeks using Slack's web app injection. Growing awareness of workplace communication standards makes this timely. Tip jar for unlimited rewrites.
entries.pain: Workers send tone-deaf Slack messages that damage relationships and careers

entries.title: Public Job Posting Salary Extractor
entries.notes: Scrapes LinkedIn, Indeed, and company career pages to extract and normalize salary ranges. Uses structured extraction with fallback to LLM parsing. Built in 3 weeks with Playwright and extraction logic. Targets recruiting teams with per-seat pricing.
entries.pain: Recruiters waste hours manually extracting and normalizing salary data from job postings

entries.title: Gong Call Commitment Tracker
entries.notes: Integrates with Gong API to extract stated commitments and create follow-up tasks automatically. Built in 3 weeks with Gong's transcription API. Direct value prop for sales teams using Gong. Freemium with call limit, per-seat for power users.
entries.pain: Sales reps forget promises made during calls, damaging trust and losing deals

entries.title: Browser Tab Sleep Scheduler
entries.notes: Schedules tabs to hibernate during set hours (e.g., overnight) and wake on demand. Built in 2 weeks using Chrome's tab update API. Addresses real battery/performance pain with clear ROI. Freemium for basic scheduling, premium for smart wake triggers.
entries.pain: Unused tabs drain battery and slow down the browser throughout the workday

entries.title: CI Pipeline Carbon Tracker
entries.notes: Integrates with GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, and CircleCI to estimate CO2 emissions based on build time and runner type. Built in 3 weeks with CI APIs and carbon intensity estimation. Growing ESG focus in tech makes this timely. Tip jar for detailed reports.
entries.pain: Developers have no visibility into the environmental cost of their CI/CD pipelines

entries.title: Conference Attendee LinkedIn Filter
entries.notes: Uploads attendee list, cross-references LinkedIn profiles, and filters by company, role seniority, and mutual connections. Built in 4 weeks with LinkedIn API and matching logic. Quota-based model for conference passes. Solves real networking pain.
entries.pain: Conference attendees drown in connection requests and miss finding relevant professionals

entries.title: API Response Cache Auditor
entries.notes: Overlays cache headers and CDN cache status on network requests, highlighting TTL mismatches and cache bypasses. Built in 2 weeks as a devtools panel extension. Directly useful for API developers debugging caching. Per-seat pricing for team accounts.
entries.pain: Backend developers can't see if their API responses are being cached correctly by CDNs

entries.title: Read Later Tag Organizer
entries.notes: Auto-tags and categorizes Pocket/Instapaper articles using LLM topic modeling, surfacing forgotten relevant content. Built in 3 weeks with Pocket API integration. Addresses the read-later guilt problem. Tip jar for advanced organization features.
entries.pain: People accumulate hundreds of read-later articles they never actually read or organize

entries.title: Email Thread Priority Scorer
entries.notes: Scans Gmail inbox using LLM to score email priority based on sender importance, urgency signals, and deal context. Built in 2 weeks with Gmail API. Directly addresses inbox overload for sales teams. Per-seat pricing with trial period.
entries.pain: Sales reps waste time on low-value emails while high-value prospect replies slip through
